name: pesquisaKpis
code:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_RESPOSTAS, ROUND(AVG(P.VALOR), 1) AS MEDIA_NOTA, SUM(CASE WHEN P.VALOR >= 9 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS PROMOTORES, SUM(CASE WHEN P.VALOR <= 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DETRATORES, SUM(CASE WHEN P.VALOR >= 7 AND P.VALOR <= 8 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NEUTROS FROM PESQUISAS P WHERE ('{{mes}}' = '' OR SUBSTRING(P.DATA_RESPOSTA, 1, 7) = '{{mes}}')
AND ('{{dataInicio}}' = '' OR SUBSTRING(P.DATA_RESPOSTA, 1, 10) >= '{{dataInicio}}')
AND ('{{dataFim}}' = '' OR SUBSTRING(P.DATA_RESPOSTA, 1, 10) <= '{{dataFim}}')
